illegal-zone-edge.legal_direction: apps/web -> packages/sdk or packages/ui -> packages/domain; packages/ui must never import packages/sdk

domain-purity.legal_direction: packages/domain -> deliberate pure TypeScript helpers only

browser-server-boundary.legal_direction: browser code -> browser-safe domain, SDK, and UI entry points only

provider-location.legal_direction: provider SDKs -> apps/api/adapters/sources or packages/agent only

raw-network.legal_direction: React/UI code -> injected browser-safe SDK services; SDK services own application requests

fastapi-layer.legal_direction: FastAPI imports -> apps/api/transport, apps/api/bootstrap, or package-root type-only public facade

sqlalchemy-layer.legal_direction: SQLAlchemy imports -> apps/api/adapters or apps/api/bootstrap only; records never enter transport/contracts

python-layer-edge.legal_direction: Python API dependencies -> inward according to domain, ports, application, adapters, workers, transport/contracts, then bootstrap

concrete-adapter-import.legal_direction: concrete adapter imports -> declared composition roots or adapter-local code only

credential-leakage.legal_direction: credentials/authRef -> server-side secret authority only; browser and wire models receive sanitized health

environment-read.legal_direction: environment reads -> typed configuration or bootstrap only

private-import.legal_direction: cross-package and upstream imports -> declared public package entry points only

unknown-deepwork-import.legal_direction: @deepwork imports -> a declared public package entry point in tools/architecture/graph.json

import-cycle.legal_direction: module and package dependencies -> acyclic inward graph

esm-extension.legal_direction: relative ESM imports -> explicit runtime .js, .mjs, .cjs, or .json extension

generated-drift.legal_direction: generated architecture views -> exact projection of tools/architecture/graph.json

parse-error.legal_direction: checked source -> syntactically parseable Python and statically readable TypeScript imports
